testCases.title: Verify navigation to Lessons page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/lessons/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to FAQ page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/faq/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to Login page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/login/'

testCases.title: Verify team search functionality
steps: Verification: Expect search results to be displayed
expected: Search results for Toronto Maple Leafs are displayed

testCases.title: Verify pagination functionality
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=1'
expected: Navigates to the page 1 and content loads successfully

testCases.title: Verify pagination functionality - next page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=5'
expected: Navigates to the next page and content loads successfully

testCases.title: Verify changing records per page
steps: Verification: Expect select dropdown to open
expected: Dropdown opens and the available options are displayed
